name: D-D-trees-with-hazards
description: Trees with hazards — near power lines and leaning toward house

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: Thanks for calling NorthStar Tree Service. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: I have a large tree leaning toward my house and another near the power lines.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.utterance: A tree leaning toward the house and another near power lines. Are these an emergency?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.utterance: The one near the house is urgent. The power line one can wait.
